items.title: 过去完成时
items.explanation:
过去完成时表示在过去某一时间或动作之前已经完成的动作，即"过去的过去"。

1. **构成**：主语 + had + 过去分词。
2. **用法**：表示在过去某一时间点之前已完成的动作，常与by the time, before, when等连用。
3. **常用于间接引语**：当主句是过去时，从句中原来现在完成时要变为过去完成时。
items.formula:
肯定：主语 + had + 过去分词
否定：主语 + hadn't + 过去分词
疑问：Had + 主语 + 过去分词?

examples.en: By the time I arrived, the film had already started.
examples.zh: 我到的时候，电影已经开始了。

examples.en: She had never seen such a beautiful place before.
examples.zh: 她以前从未见过这么美的地方。

examples.en: He said he had finished the project.
examples.zh: 他说他已经完成了项目。

commonMistakes.wrong: After I had ate dinner, I went out.
commonMistakes.right: After I had eaten dinner, I went out.
When I arrived, she had left.
commonMistakes.note: 如果"她离开"发生在"我到达"之前，需要用过去完成时

exercises.question: When I got to the station, the train ___ .
exercises.explanation: 火车离开发生在我到达之前（过去的过去），用过去完成时。

exercises.question: By the end of last month, we ___ 2000 words.
exercises.explanation: by+过去时间，用过去完成时。

items.title: 将来进行时
items.explanation:
将来进行时表示在将来某一时间正在进行的动作。

1. **构成**：主语 + will be + V-ing。
2. **用法**：将来某时刻正在进行的动作、已安排好一定会发生的事。
items.formula:
肯定：主语 + will be + V-ing
否定：主语 + won't be + V-ing

examples.en: This time tomorrow, I will be flying to London.
examples.zh: 明天这个时候，我将正在飞往伦敦的飞机上。

examples.en: I will be waiting for you at the airport.
examples.zh: 我会在机场等你。

commonMistakes.right: At 8pm tonight, I will be watching TV.
commonMistakes.note: 将来特定时刻正在进行的动作用将来进行时

exercises.question: Don't call me at 7pm. I ___ dinner then.
exercises.explanation: 将来某一时刻正在进行的动作用将来进行时。

items.title: 动词不定式
items.explanation:
动词不定式（to do）是非谓语动词的一种，在句中可作主语、宾语、宾语补足语、定语、状语等。

1. **作主语**：To learn English well is important. (常用it作形式主语：It's important to learn English well.)
2. **作宾语**：常见动词有want, hope, decide, plan, refuse, promise等。
3. **作宾补**：ask/tell/want sb. to do sth.
4. **作定语**：放在被修饰词之后（something to eat）。
5. **作状语**：表目的（in order to, so as to）。
items.formula:
to + 动词原形（否定: not to do）
It is + adj. + for/of sb. + to do sth.

examples.en: To see is to believe.
examples.zh: 眼见为实。

examples.en: He promised to help me.
examples.zh: 他答应帮我。

examples.en: I have a lot of homework to do.
examples.zh: 我有很多作业要做。

examples.en: She got up early to catch the first bus.
examples.zh: 她早起是为了赶第一班公交车。

commonMistakes.right: I want to go to college.

exercises.question: It's necessary for us ___ enough sleep.
exercises.explanation: It is + adj. + for sb. + to do sth. 句型，不定式作真正的主语。

exercises.question: He raised his voice ___ himself heard.

items.title: 动名词
items.explanation:
动名词（V-ing）具有名词的性质，在句中可作主语、宾语、表语、定语。

1. **作主语**：Reading is my hobby.
2. **作宾语**：常见动词enjoy, finish, mind, suggest, practice, avoid, consider等后用动名词。
3. **介词+动名词**：I'm interested in learning English.
4. **固定搭配**：look forward to doing, be used to doing, can't help doing等。
items.formula:
V-ing 作主语/宾语
prep. + V-ing（介词后必须用动名词）

examples.en: Swimming is good exercise.
examples.zh: 游泳是很好的锻炼。

examples.en: Would you mind opening the window?
examples.zh: 你介意打开窗户吗？

examples.en: I'm looking forward to hearing from you.
examples.zh: 我期待收到你的来信。

examples.en: He avoided answering my question.
examples.zh: 他回避回答我的问题。

commonMistakes.wrong: I look forward to hear from you.
commonMistakes.right: I look forward to hearing from you.
commonMistakes.note: look forward to中to是介词，后面跟动名词

commonMistakes.wrong: He suggested to go by train.
commonMistakes.note: suggest后跟动名词，不跟不定式

exercises.question: He is used to ___ early.
exercises.explanation: be used to doing sth. 习惯做某事，to是介词。

exercises.question: I can't help ___ when I heard the news.
exercises.explanation: can't help doing 忍不住做某事。

items.title: 分词
items.explanation:
分词包括现在分词（V-ing）和过去分词（V-ed），具有形容词和副词的性质。

1. **现在分词（V-ing）**：表示主动或正在进行。
   - 作定语：the sleeping boy（正在睡觉的男孩）
   - 作状语：Hearing the news, she burst into tears.
2. **过去分词（V-ed）**：表示被动或已经完成。
   - 作定语：a broken window（被打碎的窗户）
   - 作状语：Seen from the top, the city looks beautiful.
3. **分词作宾补**：see/hear sb. doing（正在做）/ see/hear sth. done（被做）。
items.formula:
现在分词(V-ing) = 主动/进行
过去分词(V-ed) = 被动/完成

examples.en: The girl standing there is my sister.
examples.zh: 站在那里的女孩是我妹妹。

examples.en: Walking in the park, I met an old friend.
examples.zh: 在公园散步时，我遇到了一位老朋友。

examples.en: The house built last year is very modern.
examples.zh: 去年建的房子非常现代化。

examples.en: I had my hair cut yesterday.
examples.zh: 我昨天理了发。

commonMistakes.wrong: Seeing from the hill, the city is beautiful.
commonMistakes.right: Seen from the hill, the city is beautiful.
commonMistakes.note: 城市是被看的，用过去分词

commonMistakes.wrong: I heard her sang in the next room.
commonMistakes.right: I heard her singing in the next room.
commonMistakes.note: hear sb. doing 听到某人正在做某事

exercises.question: ___ from the top of the mountain, the town looks small.
exercises.explanation: 小镇是被看的，用过去分词表被动。

exercises.question: The man ___ a lecture is our new teacher.
exercises.explanation: 正在做讲座的男人，主动进行用现在分词。

items.title: 虚拟条件句
items.explanation:
虚拟语气表示说话人的愿望、假设、猜测或建议，而不是客观事实。

1. **与现在事实相反**：If + 主语 + 过去式(were), 主语 + would/could/might + 动词原形。
2. **与过去事实相反**：If + 主语 + had + 过去分词, 主语 + would/could/might + have + 过去分词。
3. **与将来事实相反**：If + 主语 + were to/should + 动词原形, 主语 + would/could/might + 动词原形。
4. **错综时间条件句**：主句和从句时间不一致，各自按对应时间调整。
5. **含蓄条件句**：用but for, without等代替if从句。
items.formula:
现在：If + 主语 + did/were, 主语 + would do
过去：If + 主语 + had done, 主语 + would have done
将来：If + 主语 + were to do/should do, 主语 + would do

examples.en: If I were you, I would accept the offer.
examples.zh: 如果我是你，我会接受这个工作机会。

examples.en: If he had studied harder, he would have passed the exam.
examples.zh: 如果他当初更努力学习，他就通过考试了。

examples.en: Without your help, I couldn't have succeeded.
examples.zh: 没有你的帮助，我不可能成功。

commonMistakes.wrong: If I was you, I would go.
commonMistakes.right: If I were you, I would go.
commonMistakes.note: 虚拟条件中be动词通常用were，无论主语是什么人称

commonMistakes.wrong: If he studied harder, he would have passed.
commonMistakes.right: If he had studied harder, he would have passed.
commonMistakes.note: 与过去事实相反，从句用had done

exercises.question: If I ___ a bird, I ___ fly freely in the sky.
exercises.explanation: 与现在事实相反的虚拟语气，be动词用were，主句用would+动词原形。

exercises.question: If she ___ earlier, she wouldn't have missed the train.
exercises.explanation: 与过去事实相反，从句用had+过去分词。

items.title: 名词性从句中的虚拟语气
items.explanation:
在表示建议、要求、命令、必要性等含义的名词性从句中，谓语用(should) + 动词原形。

1. **常见动词**：suggest, advise, recommend, require, demand, insist, order, command等。
2. **常见形容词**：necessary, important, essential, strange等。
3. **常见名词**：suggestion, advice, requirement, order等。
items.formula:
suggest/recommend/require + that + 主语 + (should) + 动词原形
It is necessary/important + that + 主语 + (should) + 动词原形

examples.en: I suggest that he (should) take a rest.
examples.zh: 我建议他休息一下。

examples.en: It is necessary that everyone (should) obey the rules.
examples.zh: 每个人都有必要遵守规则。

examples.en: The doctor advised that she (should) give up smoking.
examples.zh: 医生建议她戒烟。

commonMistakes.wrong: I suggest him to go there.
commonMistakes.right: I suggest that he (should) go there.
commonMistakes.note: suggest后不跟sb. to do，要用that从句

commonMistakes.wrong: She insisted that she was right.
commonMistakes.right: She insisted that she (should) be right.
commonMistakes.note: 如果insist表示"坚持认为"（事实），则不用虚拟语气；如果表示"坚持要求"，则用虚拟语气

exercises.question: The teacher suggested that every student ___ the book carefully.
exercises.explanation: suggest后的that从句用(should)+动词原形，should可以省略。

exercises.question: It is required that all students ___ the school uniform.
exercises.explanation: required后的主语从句用虚拟语气(should) wear。

items.title: 倒装句
items.explanation:
倒装分为完全倒装和部分倒装。

**一、完全倒装**（谓语全部置于主语前）：
1. here/there/now/then开头的句子，主语是名词时倒装。
2. 表示地点/方向的介词短语放句首。

**二、部分倒装**（助动词/情态动词置于主语前）：
1. 否定词/短语放句首：never, seldom, hardly, not until, no sooner...than, hardly...when。
2. Only + 状语放句首。
3. so/neither/nor 表示"也……/也不……"。
4. so...that/such...that结构中so/such部分放句首。
items.formula:
完全倒装：Here comes the bus.
部分倒装：Never have I seen such a beautiful sight.
          Only in this way can we solve the problem.

examples.en: Here comes the teacher.
examples.zh: 老师来了。

examples.en: Never have I seen such a beautiful sunset.
examples.zh: 我从未见过如此美丽的日落。

examples.en: Not until he finished the work did he realize how hard it was.
examples.zh: 直到完成工作，他才意识到有多难。

examples.en: Only by working hard can you achieve your goal.
examples.zh: 只有努力工作，你才能实现目标。

commonMistakes.wrong: Never I have seen such a thing.
commonMistakes.right: Never have I seen such a thing.
commonMistakes.note: 否定词放句首要用部分倒装

commonMistakes.wrong: Hardly he had arrived when it began to rain.
commonMistakes.right: Hardly had he arrived when it began to rain.
commonMistakes.note: Hardly...when结构中hardly所在主句要倒装

exercises.question: Not until the meeting was over ___ that he had left his notes at home.
exercises.explanation: Not until放句首，主句要用部分倒装。

exercises.question: Only after the accident ___ the importance of safety.
exercises.explanation: Only+状语放句首用部分倒装，事故发生在过去用did。

items.title: 强调句
items.explanation:
强调句用来突出句子的某一成分。

1. **It is/was...that/who...**：强调除谓语外的任何成分。
   - 强调主语：It was Tom who/that broke the window.
   - 强调宾语：It was the window that Tom broke.
   - 强调状语：It was yesterday that Tom broke the window.
2. **do/does/did + 动词原形**：强调谓语动词。
   - I do believe you.
   - She did come yesterday.
items.formula:
It is/was + 被强调部分 + that/who + 句子剩余部分
强调谓语：do/does/did + 动词原形

examples.en: It was in the library that I met her.
examples.zh: 是在图书馆我遇见了她。

examples.en: He did tell the truth.
examples.zh: 他确实说了真话。

examples.en: It is your attitude that matters most.
examples.zh: 最重要的是你的态度。

commonMistakes.wrong: It was at the school where we met.
commonMistakes.right: It was at the school that we met.

commonMistakes.wrong: It is I who is to blame.
commonMistakes.right: It is I who am to blame.
commonMistakes.note: who后的谓语与前面的被强调主语保持一致

exercises.question: It was in the park ___ I saw the accident.
exercises.explanation: 强调句型用that，强调地点状语。

exercises.question: He ___ come to see you yesterday, but you were not at home.
exercises.explanation: 强调过去时谓语用did+动词原形。

items.title: 定语从句
items.explanation:
定语从句修饰名词或代词。

1. **关系代词**：
   - who（指人，作主语/宾语）
   - whom（指人，作宾语）
   - whose（指人或物，表所属关系）
   - which（指物，作主语/宾语）
   - that（指人或物，作主语/宾语）
2. **关系副词**：
   - when（指时间）
   - where（指地点）
   - why（指原因）
3. **限制性 vs 非限制性**：非限制性定语从句用逗号隔开，不能用that引导。
4. **介词+关系代词**：介词后只能用which/whom，不能用that。
items.formula:
先行词 + 关系代词/副词 + 从句
非限制性：先行词, which/who/whom + 从句

examples.en: The man who is speaking is my uncle.
examples.zh: 正在说话的那个人是我叔叔。

examples.en: This is the house where I was born.
examples.zh: 这就是我出生的房子。

examples.en: Beijing, which is the capital of China, is a beautiful city.
examples.zh: 北京，中国的首都，是一座美丽的城市。

examples.en: The reason why he was late is still unknown.
examples.zh: 他迟到的原因仍然未知。

commonMistakes.wrong: This is the house where I bought last year.
commonMistakes.right: This is the house which/that I bought last year.
commonMistakes.note: house在从句中作宾语，用which/that而非where

commonMistakes.wrong: He is the man who I met him yesterday.
commonMistakes.right: He is the man whom I met yesterday.
commonMistakes.note: met的宾语在从句中已经由关系代词充当，不能再出现him

exercises.question: The factory ___ my father works is far from here.
exercises.explanation: 先行词factory在从句中作地点状语(in the factory)，用where。

exercises.question: Do you know the girl ___ is dancing on the stage?
exercises.explanation: 先行词girl指人，在从句中作主语，用who。
